policy: twenty-route target is an evaluation lens, not a brittle quota
weakGameRule: Do not preserve weak games for their own sake; keep, expand, or seed only routes that validate DSK boundaries, reveal missing ProtoKits, validate composites, or stress deterministic gameplay.
decisionRule: A route remains or becomes canonical only when it validates reusable domain pressure and has a credible path to headless fixed-tick smoke plus deterministic replay.

targetRoutes.routeDecision: harden as the survey-pressure canonical proof instead of preserving parallel cartographer seeds as full games
targetRoutes.localJsPressure: move scan progress, zone pressure, hazard escalation, and objective snapshots toward reusable survey DSKs
targetRoutes.rendererBoundary: browser view, fog rendering, and input remain host-owned presentation
smokeReplayGap: descriptor hash for relay objective state

targetRoutes.routeDecision: harden as the strongest ProtoKit-backed strategic-pressure proof and keep variants folded until remaining facade seams shrink
targetRoutes.localJsPressure: continue shrinking browser-host convenience facade calls toward engine.n.genericDefense session and descriptor aliases
targetRoutes.rendererBoundary: Canvas, DOM, frame timing, and visual projection remain route presentation only
smokeReplayGap: browser host blueprint/sell/wave preview facade shrink

targetRoutes.routeDecision: harden as the survival ecology lane only after pickup, gear, horde, hazard, and health state are reusable
targetRoutes.localJsPressure: move horde cadence, pickup ledger, gear state, and hazard outcome rules out of route-local code
targetRoutes.rendererBoundary: canvas orchard view and input affordances stay host-owned

targetRoutes.routeDecision: harden as the compact traversal checkpoint/action-pressure proof before adding cargo-heavy variants
targetRoutes.localJsPressure: move grapple/checkpoint/resource-pressure state toward reusable traversal DSKs while keeping renderer thin
targetRoutes.rendererBoundary: snapshot renderer and browser input bridge remain route presentation

targetRoutes.routeDecision: fold open-above harness pressure into the Sora canonical lane until a distinct aerial DSK boundary exists
targetRoutes.localJsPressure: separate terrain/updraft/checkpoint/camera state from renderer and browser controls
targetRoutes.rendererBoundary: sky renderer, camera projection, and input feel stay host-owned

targetRoutes.routeDecision: hold as a traversal variant until vehicle contact and route timing become reusable DSK pressure beyond Next Ledge
targetRoutes.localJsPressure: avoid adding bespoke racing physics until contact and checkpoint ledgers are reusable
targetRoutes.rendererBoundary: camera shake, track visuals, and controls remain presentation

targetRoutes.routeDecision: hold as cargo/salvage pressure that should fold into a cargo-delivery lane before canonical promotion
targetRoutes.localJsPressure: move salvage inventory, delivery scoring, and hazard tide pressure to reusable ledgers
targetRoutes.rendererBoundary: harbor art, water effects, and pointer affordances stay host-owned

targetRoutes.routeDecision: hold until cargo chain state creates reusable route/cargo/tether pressure instead of a one-off delivery skin
targetRoutes.localJsPressure: centralize cargo chain ledger, handoff windows, and completion scoring
targetRoutes.rendererBoundary: chain visuals and delivery UI stay route presentation

targetRoutes.routeDecision: hold until aerial traversal and cargo delivery combine into a higher-level courier DSK
targetRoutes.localJsPressure: avoid duplicating Sora flight state while adding delivery ledgers
targetRoutes.rendererBoundary: skybox, parcel visuals, and camera feel stay host-owned

targetRoutes.routeDecision: hold until build, resource, lock, and docking descriptors are reusable enough to pressure a field-engineer composite
targetRoutes.localJsPressure: move docking/build/resource loop out of local JS before canonicalizing
targetRoutes.rendererBoundary: orbital scene and dock animation stay host presentation

targetRoutes.routeDecision: hold as a stealth/survey variant unless it proves a reusable observation, patrol, or exhibit-state DSK
targetRoutes.localJsPressure: avoid route-owned patrol and observation logic until reusable survey/patrol boundaries exist
targetRoutes.rendererBoundary: lighting, stealth visuals, and museum layout stay presentation

targetRoutes.routeDecision: hold until timed production, resource pressure, and machine descriptors form a reusable factory pulse DSK
targetRoutes.localJsPressure: move production timing and ledger state into reusable headless kits
targetRoutes.rendererBoundary: factory animation and UI panels stay presentation

targetRoutes.routeDecision: hold until rescue/cargo plus hazard pressure creates reusable evacuation boundary state
targetRoutes.localJsPressure: move rescue target state, flood hazard progression, and route outcomes into reusable ledgers
targetRoutes.rendererBoundary: water visuals and rescue presentation remain host-owned

targetRoutes.routeDecision: hold until multi-agent scan coverage adds reusable swarm/survey pressure beyond Fogline Relay
targetRoutes.localJsPressure: move drone assignment, scan coverage, and zone objective state to reusable DSKs
targetRoutes.rendererBoundary: drone visualization and camera composition remain presentation

targetRoutes.routeDecision: hold until switching, route ledger, and cargo flow become reusable traversal/cargo methods
targetRoutes.localJsPressure: avoid one-off rail switch state; model switches, cargo, and gates as reusable resources/events
targetRoutes.rendererBoundary: rail visuals and switch UI remain presentation

targetRoutes.routeDecision: hold as traversal/resource variant until cave hazards and checkpoint pressure are reusable
targetRoutes.localJsPressure: move cave hazard state and collectible pressure into reusable kits
targetRoutes.rendererBoundary: crystal visuals and rally camera remain presentation

targetRoutes.routeDecision: hold until creature/resource/hazard behavior forms reusable survival ecology pressure
targetRoutes.localJsPressure: move creature state, wrangle actions, and biodome hazards into reusable DSK surfaces
targetRoutes.rendererBoundary: biodome visuals and animal presentation stay route-owned

targetRoutes.routeDecision: hold until action input, defense pressure, and extraction endpoints reuse the hellscape lane instead of duplicating it
targetRoutes.localJsPressure: avoid separate dungeon combat/extraction loops until the action-defense-extraction DSK is reusable
targetRoutes.rendererBoundary: dungeon visuals, camera, and effects stay presentation

targetRoutes.routeDecision: fold into Signal Bastion unless mech-specific control adds reusable build/agent/combat pressure beyond generic defense
targetRoutes.localJsPressure: do not create a mech-specific tower-defense interpreter in Experiments
targetRoutes.rendererBoundary: mech silhouettes and animation remain presentation if revived
smokeReplayGap: mech control replay only after generic combat resolver boundary exists

targetRoutes.routeDecision: hold non-canonical until deterministic decision/economy/social DSK state exists
targetRoutes.localJsPressure: avoid bespoke market/court/broker state until choice windows, ledgers, and outcomes replay deterministically
targetRoutes.rendererBoundary: market UI, dialogue presentation, and browsing affordances stay host-owned

manifestCanonicalRouteCoverage.targetLens: field-engineer composition coverage outside the original twenty-name target
manifestCanonicalRouteCoverage.portfolioDecision: canonical only as a kit-utilization composite pressure route
canonical aerial lane absorbs open-above harness pressure
canonical target retained but still contract-only

manifestCanonicalRouteCoverage.targetLens: Signal Bastion plus folded Mech Bastion defense pressure
manifestCanonicalRouteCoverage.portfolioDecision: canonical target retained and executable route-domain proven

manifestCanonicalRouteCoverage.targetLens: Dungeon Relay/action-defense-extraction pressure outside the original twenty-name target
manifestCanonicalRouteCoverage.portfolioDecision: canonical only as unified action-defense-extraction base route
